raw_comment:
Notice- The percentage of players of color is so much higher than coaches of color

Wonder- Why is the MLB so much lower than the rest in terms of player percentage?

Impact- A very good majority of people watch sports, especially right now with the superbowl coming up. It's important for kids to see someone of the same race as them doing great things and showing that they can be more than they are told

Headline- Diversity in Sports: Who do Our Children Have to Look up to?
ace_sentences: The percentage of players of color is much higher than the percentage of coaches of color.
The MLB is much lower than the rest in terms of player percentage.
Many people watch sports right now.
It is important for kids to see someone of the same race as them.
It is important for kids to see someone of the same race as them doing great things.
It is important for kids to see someone of the same race as them showing that they can be more than they are told.
Diversity in Sports: Who do Our Children Have to Look up to?
